_fixture_notes: Case 22 (spec gap): Derived component with empty ingredient_ids and empty step_indices arrays. Both fields are required arrays per spec, but spec doesn't state minimum length. Tests whether 'required array' means 'present and non-empty' or just 'present'. Semantically nonsensical (a component with no ingredients or steps) but literally permitted by the spec wording.
name: Dressed Rocket with Empty-Arrays Derived Component
description: Tests validator behaviour on a derived component where both required reference arrays are empty.

steps.title: Dress
steps.content: Toss {0002} with {0001} and a pinch of salt.

derived_components.name: Empty Reference Arrays
derived_components.description: A derived component declaring no ingredients and no steps.
derived_components.notes: Spec gap — semantically nonsensical, literally permitted.
